ddls:
CREATE TABLE "development_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the development index (e.g., CCVI, HDI) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the index and its significance */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the index (e.g., CCVI, HDI) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the index (e.g., Economic, Social, Environmental) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the index data (e.g., UNDP, World Bank) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country's capital */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country's capital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_values" (
  "index_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index value entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country corresponding to the index value */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the development index */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the index for the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the index value is recorded */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the index value (e.g., percentage, points) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the index value data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the index value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_values_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES development_indices ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_values_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "index_value_id" INTEGER /* ID of the index value being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the index value was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_index_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_value_id") REFERENCES index_values ("index_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" TEXT /* Total population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Total GDP of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related development index */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the metadata */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last updated date of the metadata */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the metadata entry */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the metadata */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the metadata (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_metadata_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES development_indices ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison entry */,
  "index_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first index in the comparison */,
  "index_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second index in the comparison */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country being compared */,
  "comparison_date" TEXT /* Date of the comparison */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the comparison (e.g., Index 1 is higher) */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the comparison */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_comparisons_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_comparisons_index_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("index_id_2") REFERENCES development_indices ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_comparisons_index_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("index_id_1") REFERENCES development_indices ("index_id")
)
